requirement_topic.en: Kazakhstan Market Access and EAC Marking
requirement_topic.zh: 哈萨克斯坦市场准入与 EAC 标志
requirement_topic.zht: 哈薩克斯坦市場准入與 EAC 標誌

summary.en: Kazakhstan applies EAEU and Customs Union technical regulations as a full EAEU member. Regulated power tools are placed on the market through EAC marking supported by accredited declaration or certification, with national standards infrastructure involving Gosstandart and KazInSt. Radio-enabled tools or connected chargers may additionally need national telecom authority handling. Import logistics often route through Aktau or Khorgos rail corridors, but logistics routing does not change the EAC obligation.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦作为 EAEU 正式成员适用 EAEU 及海关联盟技术法规。受管制电动工具须通过认可声明或认证支持的 EAC 标志投放市场，国家标准体系涉及 Gosstandart 与 KazInSt。带无线电功能的工具或联网充电器可能还需国家电信主管机关处理。进口物流常经阿克套或霍尔果斯铁路通道，但物流路径不改变 EAC 义务。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦作為 EAEU 正式成員適用 EAEU 及海關聯盟技術法規。受管制電動工具須通過認可聲明或認證支持的 EAC 標誌投放市場，國家標準體系涉及 Gosstandart 與 KazInSt。帶無線電功能的工具或聯網充電器可能還需國家電信主管機關處理。進口物流常經阿克套或霍爾果斯鐵路通道，但物流路徑不改變 EAC 義務。

standards_or_laws: Treaty on the Eurasian Economic Union market-access framework
EAC marking for products covered by EAEU and Customs Union technical regulations
Accredited declaration or certification for TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 as applicable
Kazakhstan national standards infrastructure: Gosstandart and KazInSt
National telecom authority route for radio-enabled products where applicable

summary.en: China domestic market release normally depends on GB 3883 or GB/T 3883, GB 4343 EMC evidence, and CCC where applicable. These are useful inputs, but they do not create an EAC-marking right or Kazakhstan importer file by themselves.
summary.zh: 中国国内投放通常依赖 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883、GB 4343 EMC 证据及适用时的 CCC。这些是有用输入，但本身不产生 EAC 标志权利或哈萨克斯坦进口商文件。
summary.zht: 中國國內投放通常依賴 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883、GB 4343 EMC 證據及適用時的 CCC。這些是有用輸入，但本身不產生 EAC 標誌權利或哈薩克斯坦進口商文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC where applicable for China domestic market access

gap.en: The market-access gap is procedural and documentary: China certificates must be converted into an EAEU technical file, accredited declaration or certification, importer traceability, Russian or Kazakhstan-required labeling, and EAC marking before shipment through Aktau, Khorgos, or other routes.
gap.zh: 市场准入差距是程序和文件层面的：中国证书须转换为 EAEU 技术文件、认可声明或认证、进口商追溯、俄文或哈萨克斯坦要求标签及 EAC 标志，之后方可经阿克套、霍尔果斯或其他路线出货。
gap.zht: 市場准入差距是程序和文件層面的：中國證書須轉換為 EAEU 技術文件、認可聲明或認證、進口商追溯、俄文或哈薩克斯坦要求標籤及 EAC 標誌，之後方可經阿克套、霍爾果斯或其他路線出貨。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory EAC conformity route for products covered by EAEU and Customs Union technical regulations; radio features may add national telecom handling.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB, GB/T, GB 4343, and CCC evidence supports China domestic compliance only unless incorporated into an accredited EAEU conformity file.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-ready tool is not Kazakhstan-market-ready until the importer or manufacturer holds the applicable EAEU conformity documents, applies EAC marking, and resolves any radio or telecom layer before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国市场就绪的工具，在进口商或制造商持有适用 EAEU 合格评定文件、加贴 EAC 标志并在进口前解决任何无线电或电信层要求前，不能视为哈萨克斯坦市场就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國市場就緒的工具，在進口商或製造商持有適用 EAEU 合格評定文件、加貼 EAC 標誌並在進口前解決任何無線電或電信層要求前，不能視為哈薩克斯坦市場就緒。
